description: You are a Performance Engineer preparing for a weekly peak load review. Analyze the worst-case CPU utilization across your EC2 fleet by creating a Graphite dashboard named 'Peak Load Analysis'. The dashboard must include three graphs with exact titles and targets: 'Hourly CPU Peaks' using target summarize(servers.ec2_instance_1.cpu.utilization, "1hour", "max"), 'Worst Case Instance' using target highestMax(servers.ec2_instance_*.cpu.*, 1), and 'Fleet CPU Ceiling' using target maxSeries(servers.ec2_instance_1.cpu.utilization, servers.ec2_instance_2.cpu.utilization, servers.ec2_instance_3.cpu.cloudwatch_utilization). Note that ec2_instance_3 uses the 'cloudwatch_utilization' suffix. Save the dashboard when complete.
